name: message-decision-packs
description: Author, validate, and use Message Decision Packs with the local mdp CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Create and route local decision context.
interface.longDescription: Message Decision Packs helps supported agents create, validate, and use local GTM messaging plus Proposal and Recruiting review decision context. MDP stores profile-owned criteria, source evidence, proof, boundaries, output contracts, routes, eval fixtures, and explicit gaps over a stable local card model. It stops at validated context and human-review artifacts; sending, CRM or ATS updates, enrichment, scraping, sourcing, sequencing, proposal submission, candidate ranking, rejection, hiring, and other external execution stay outside MDP.
defaultPrompt: Turn these ICP, positioning, and source notes into a local Message Decision Pack, then validate it.
Review this .mdp pack for gaps, unsupported claims, routing issues, and weak eval coverage.
Given this prospect context, run the MDP fit gate and create a message brief only if the context is sufficient.
Build a synthetic Recruiting review pack with source-backed criteria, evidence gaps, strict safety evals, and human-review boundaries.
